provenance_note: This CLI was first hand-built and dogfooded against a self-hosted Plane workspace before research.json provenance was captured as files. This record documents the real design basis (vendored official spec + two dogfooded novel features) reconstructed at reprint time; it is not a fresh web-research pass.

spec_source.detail: Plane v1.3.0 Community Edition OpenAPI, served dynamically by drf-spectacular at /api/schema/ on every instance (upstream github.com/makeplane/plane publishes no static spec). Re-expressed so the workspace scope lives in servers: as a {slug} variable instead of being baked into every path, which is the form the profiler recognizes for tenant scope.

patterns: Workspace-scoped REST: every endpoint is /api/v1/workspaces/{slug}/...; /api/v1/users/ and /api/v1/assets/ are the only non-workspace paths.
Project fan-out: issues, cycles, modules, labels, states, intake-issues, archived-cycles/modules are all nested under /projects/{project_id}/, so sync must enumerate projects and loop.
Incremental sync via updated_at__gt query filter (detected as the since-param).

Module membership is not returned by the issue serializer (list or retrieve) — module_ids is null on every issue payload; the only source of truth is the reverse /modules/{id}/module-issues/ endpoint.
Plane CE exposes list + create on /work-items/{id}/relations/ but no DELETE (verified by OPTIONS: Allow GET, POST).
drf-spectacular emits both /issues/ and an aliased /work-items/ for the same resource.
gaps: No static upstream OpenAPI file; spec must be vendored from a running instance.
Profiler list-endpoint selection within a resource group is non-deterministic (Go map iteration), so the canonical issues list must be pinned and the work-items alias deduped post-generation.

novel_features.name: Issue Relations
novel_features.description: Flat list/set/unset of issue blocking, blocked_by, duplicate, relates_to and temporal links without hand-driving the relations endpoint. unset bridges Plane CE's missing DELETE via a user-configured Django-shell call (self-hosted only).

novel_features.name: Module Membership & Sync Enrichment
novel_features.description: Manage an issue's module membership (of/create-issue/sync) and auto-enrich issue module_ids during sync (on by default), since Plane's issue API never returns module membership.

narrative.headline: Every Plane workspace as a typed, offline-syncable CLI — plus issue relations and module membership the REST API hides.
narrative.value: Open-source project management (issues, cycles, modules, sub-issues, workspaces) as a terminal CLI with offline SQLite sync for instant search and analytics, an MCP server for agents, and two hand-built commands that close real REST gaps (relation delete, module membership).
